case_title: SONNY S VIRAY VS. WHISPER COMMUNICATIONS, INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF VIRAY, SONNY S AS TO DEFENDANT WHISPER COMMUNICATIONS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF VIRAY, SONNY S

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VIRAY, SONNY S RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHISPER COMMUNICATIONS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $17,568.77 PRINCIPAL, $55.07 INTEREST, $330.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,953.84, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
